resources.string: Please turn on your internet connection to continue using DuSu.
No browser found to open DuSu.

string-array.name: notif_messages
string-array.item: 🔥 Don\'t break your streak!||DuSu is waiting to talk with you today.
🤔 How was your day?||Tell DuSu in English — just 5 minutes.
👀 Someone\'s catching up!||Open the leaderboard and defend your spot.
🚀 One step closer to fluent||Today\'s conversation is waiting.
😏 Bet you can\'t speak 2 min||Prove it to DuSu right now.
💬 DuSu remembers your dream||Let\'s get one step closer today.
🎯 Your daily goal is calling||A quick session keeps the streak alive.
😴 English getting rusty?||5 minutes with DuSu fixes that.
⭐ Ready to level up?||Finish today\'s lesson and earn your XP.
🌟 Great speakers show up daily||Your turn — talk to DuSu now.
